g.text: Please use CSS style instead of skinparam ParticipantPadding
SR-1 All channels must be authenticated
INV-3 Initiator must hold required permission
show dashboard with urgency levels and estimated wait times
Post1: Live dashboard displayed with up-to-date info
EC-2 Number of targets must not exceed maxConcurrent
EC-1 Operation not proceed without valid target
SR-2 Authorization must be in initiator's permissions
Alternate Flow - No Patients in Queue

"Alternate Flow - Sudden Spike in Patient Arrivals"
TC-5 More than 2 patients and UrgencyChange count > 2
Alternate Flow - Urgency Change During Wait
createUrgencyChange(patient: Actor, oldPermission: Permission, newPermission: Permission)
EC-3 Grant must match new permission
INV-1 Operation must use at least one channel; INV-2 affect at least one resource
update dashboard with new urgency and wait time
INV-3 Initiator must hold required permission
